final:
module top_module(
    input reset,
    input clk,
    output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 0;
    end else if (count == 15) begin
        count <= 0;
    end else begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (reset) begin
        count <= 16;
      end else if (count == 0) begin
        count <= 15;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
